name: Photorealistic Portrait
description: Realistic human portrait with natural skin texture and studio-quality lighting.
prompt_prefix: photorealistic portrait photography, realistic human proportions, natural skin texture, detailed eyes, symmetrical face, professional studio lighting
prompt_suffix: sharp focus, realistic colors, high detail, shallow depth of field
negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, cartoon, anime, illustration, plastic skin, waxy skin, deformed face, asymmetrical eyes, crossed eyes, bad anatomy, malformed hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, fused fingers, duplicated limbs, watermark, text
